creator: shawn.webb@hardenedbsd.org
text:
Created attachment 255943
Patch that updates the security/libhijack port

The security/libhijack port fails to build on recent 15-CURRENT systems. This bug report and associated patch updates the port to a version that resolves the build failure.

It also switches to using HardenedBSD's GitLab instance as the source-of-truth.
